scenes.prompt:

Subject is a custom timber carport by an Austrian Zimmermeisterbetrieb, not a metal carport, not a pergola, not a garage. Realistic Lower Austria / Burgenland / Vienna surroundings, plausible family homes and driveways.
Show believable timber construction: straight posts, correct roof depth, clean rafters, credible roof edge, clean Auflager/Nuten/joinery feeling, structurally plausible spans and foundations. No crude metal angle brackets as hero detail. No impossible beams, warped posts, floating roofs, fantasy architecture, US suburbia, Mediterranean villa, showroom CGI, text, signage, watermark, readable license plates.
If a car appears, it must be fully under the roof with enough door-opening and walking space, not tight to posts/walls. True horizontal 16:9 composition, 2K, natural light, polished but believable.

Premium but realistic, one clean empty parking bay or discreet car, calm wide angle.
